summary: The diff updates `frontend/src/lib/utils.ts` to point the maleShirts category image to `/assets/generated/male-shirts-cover.dim_800x1000.jpg`, which satisfies the mapping update portion of REQ-1. However, the actual static image file (`frontend/public/assets/generated/male-shirts-cover.jpg` or the `.dim_800x1000.jpg` variant) does not appear in the diff as an added file. The 'ADDED FILES: none' section confirms no new binary/image asset was saved to the repository.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded photo (IMG-20260119-WA0021.jpg — man in blue printed shirt) as a static asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/male-shirts-cover.jpg` (or the dimensioned variant `male-shirts-cover.dim_800x1000.jpg`).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 'ADDED FILES: none', meaning no new image file was committed to `frontend/public/assets/generated/`. Only the mapping in `utils.ts` was updated, but without the actual image asset the category card will still not render correctly.
